arts.ttl: Kevin Nolan urges Northampton to enjoy League One survival
arts.sum: Victory over Shrewsbury confirmed another season in the third tier for the Cobblers.

Dara Costelloe netted twice for Northampton as Town failed to rain on the Cobblers’ parade who secured their League One status for another year - something the Salop faithful will envy. Great team play after the 34-minute mark presented Mal Benning with a shooting opportunity, but his volley went agonisingly over the crossbar.

arts.ttl: Northampton safe after emphatic win over Shrewsbury
arts.sum: Dara Costelloe scored twice in a 4-1 victory.

arts.ttl: Preview: Northampton Town vs. Shrewsbury Town - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's League One clash between Northampton Town and Shrewsbury Town, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
